name: Subtitle Studio
description: Local-first subtitle creation, multilingual adaptation, soft-subtitle handling, and AI hard-subtitle removal for directly connected Canvas video.

tools.title: Inspect video subtitles
tools.description: Inspect audio and embedded text-subtitle streams in one staged video.

tools.title: Transcribe video audio
tools.description: Extract the selected audio stream and create a timestamped soft-subtitle document locally.

tools.title: Remove embedded soft subtitles
tools.description: Remux one video while excluding selected embedded text-subtitle streams.

tools.title: Preview hard-subtitle removal
tools.description: Create one preview frame using the selected normalized subtitle search region.

tools.title: Remove burned-in subtitles
tools.description: Use the reviewed local AI pipeline to detect and inpaint burned-in subtitles inside a bounded region.

tools.title: Package soft subtitles
tools.description: Create one MP4 whose soft-subtitle streams match the current Subtitle Studio tracks.
